sourcesContent:
// Dashboard.js - Improved Practical Version import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './Dashboard.css'; function Dashboard({ dashboardData }) { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('overview'); const [selectedCustomer, setSelectedCustomer] = useState(null); if (!dashboardData) { return (

📊 Customer Churn Analysis Dashboard

Analyze customer behavior and predict churn risk

🔍

No Analysis Data Available

Run a customer analysis to view insights and predictions

); } const { individualResult, timestamp, customerData } = dashboardData; // Sample data for charts and analysis const analysisData = { churnRisk: 16.1, riskLevel: "low", customerMetrics: { tenure: 5, satisfaction: 3, orderFrequency: 2.1, avgOrderValue: 8250, daysSinceLastOrder: 7, cashbackAmount: 12000 }, monthlyData: [ { month: 'Jan', orders: 8, value: 65000, satisfaction: 4.2 }, { month: 'Feb', orders: 6, value: 52000, satisfaction: 4.0 }, { month: 'Mar', orders: 5, value: 48000, satisfaction: 3.8 }, { month: 'Apr', orders: 4, value: 42000, satisfaction: 3.5 }, { month: 'May', orders: 3, value: 38000, satisfaction: 3.2 }, { month: 'Jun', orders: 2, value: 35000, satisfaction: 3.0 } ], riskFactors: [ { factor: 'Low Satisfaction Score', impact: 85, current: 3, target: 4 }, { factor: 'Decreasing Order Frequency', impact: 78, current: 2.1, target: 3.5 }, { factor: 'Short Tenure Duration', impact: 65, current: 5, target: 12 }, { factor: 'High Days Since Last Order', impact: 60, current: 7, target: 3 }, { factor: 'Below Average Cashback Usage', impact: 45, current: 12000, target: 15000 } ], retentionActions: [ { category: "Immediate Actions (1-3 days)", actions: [ "Send personalized product recommendations based on browsing history", "Offer 15% discount on next purchase with limited time validity", "Trigger satisfaction follow-up email with quick survey" ] }, { category: "Short-term Strategies (1 week)", actions: [ "Assign dedicated account manager for personalized service", "Enroll in VIP loyalty program with exclusive benefits", "Provide free shipping on next 3 orders" ] }, { category: "Long-term Retention (2-4 weeks)", actions: [ "Invite to exclusive customer webinar or product demo", "Offer early access to new product launches", "Create customized bundle based on purchase history" ] } ] }; // Render Overview Tab const renderOverview = () => (
{/* Risk Summary */}

Churn Risk Assessment

{analysisData.riskLevel.toUpperCase()} RISK
{analysisData.churnRisk}% Probability
Retention Probability 84%
Customer Value ¥16,250
Risk Level Low
{/* Key Metrics */}
📅
{analysisData.customerMetrics.tenure} months Tenure
⭐
{analysisData.customerMetrics.satisfaction}/5 Satisfaction
🛒
{analysisData.customerMetrics.orderFrequency}/month Order Frequency
💰
¥{analysisData.customerMetrics.avgOrderValue} Avg Order Value
{/* Quick Insights */}

📈 Quick Insights

Customer has consistent order history
Satisfaction score declining over past 3 months
Good cashback utilization rate
Order frequency below category average
); // Render Detailed Analysis Tab const renderDetailedAnalysis = () => (

Detailed Behavior Analysis

Comprehensive view of customer metrics and trends

{/* Trend Charts */}

Order Trend (Last 6 Months)

{analysisData.monthlyData.map((month, index) => (
{month.month}
))}

Satisfaction Trend

{analysisData.monthlyData.map((month, index, array) => { const nextMonth = array[index + 1]; if (!nextMonth) return null; const currentY = 100 - ((month.satisfaction - 1) / 4) * 100; const nextY = 100 - ((nextMonth.satisfaction - 1) / 4) * 100; return ( ); })} {analysisData.monthlyData.map((month, index) => (
{month.satisfaction}
))}
{analysisData.monthlyData.map((month, index) => ( {month.month} ))}
{/* Risk Factors Analysis */}

🔍 Detailed Risk Factors Analysis

{analysisData.riskFactors.map((factor, index) => (
{factor.factor} {factor.impact}% Impact
Current: {factor.current} Target: {factor.target}
))}
{/* Customer Behavior Patterns */}

🔄 Customer Behavior Patterns

Purchase Frequency
Decreasing Trend

From 8 to 2 orders per month over 6 months

Category Preference
Stable

Primarily purchases Laptop & Accessories (85% of orders)

Payment Behavior
Consistent

Prefers Credit Card payments, uses coupons occasionally

Engagement Level
Declining

Reduced app usage and response to marketing emails

); // Render Action Plan Tab const renderActionPlan = () => (

🎯 Customer Retention Action Plan

Personalized strategies to improve retention and engagement

{/* Budget Allocation */}

💰 Recommended Retention Budget

¥812 Immediate Retention Actions
¥1,200 Long-term Loyalty Programs
¥2,012 Total Recommended Budget
Expected ROI: 2.2x
{/* Action Timeline */}
{analysisData.retentionActions.map((category, index) => (
{category.category}
{category.actions.map((action, actionIndex) => (
{action}
{actionIndex === 0 ? 'High' : actionIndex === 1 ? 'Medium' : 'Low'}
))}
))}
{/* Expected Outcomes */}

📊 Expected Outcomes

+25%
Increase in Order Frequency
+1.2
Improvement in Satisfaction Score
85%
Retention Probability
2.2x
Return on Investment
{/* Implementation Notes */}

💡 Implementation Guidelines

Personalization is Key: Use customer's purchase history to tailor offers
Timing Matters: Reach out within 3 days of last order for best response
Monitor Engagement: Track email opens and offer redemption rates
Follow-up: Schedule satisfaction check 7 days after intervention
); return (
{/* Dashboard Header */}

Customer Churn Analysis Dashboard

Analysis completed: {timestamp}

{/* Navigation Tabs */}
{/* Tab Content */}
{activeTab === 'overview' && renderOverview()} {activeTab === 'detailed' && renderDetailedAnalysis()} {activeTab === 'action' && renderActionPlan()}
{/* Quick Actions Footer */}
Need help? Contact customer success team or schedule a strategy session
); } export default Dashboard;
